title: Battle of Notak
content:

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], eight [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]],<ref name="Date" /> a '''battle''' occurred at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Notak]].<ref name="Before" /> The battle was a rear-guard action by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]; the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Harridan (starship)|''Harridan'']] was reassigned from its normal duties in the [[N'zoth system/Legends|N'zoth system]] to support Notak and the defensive retreat from the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner]] and [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rims]]. The ''Harridan''{{'s}} reassignment, combined with the reassignment of most of [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]], led to the [[Yevethan Uprising]] three weeks later.<ref name="Before" />

==Behind the scenes==
The fighting at Notak was first mentioned in the novel ''[[Before the Storm]]''.<ref name="Before" /> ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' later gave context to the battle's occurrence, placing the Yevethan Uprising eight months after the Battle of Endor, and reference guides such as ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' and ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' expanded on the New Republic's activities in that region of space.<ref name="TNEC" /><ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref><ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> The ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' placed the battle at Notak eight months after the Battle of Endor.<ref name="SWE">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> However, ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''{{'s}} entry on the planet Notak erroneously uses the word "years" instead of "months," thereby claiming that the battle at Notak occurred eight years after the Battle of Endor instead of eight months.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|391|Notak}}</ref>
